name_cn:
Genuine leather
Puzzle Edge Handbag Small 24cm
Latest version with adjustable strap
Lo*we🔥's debut tote*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create Puzzle's unique geometric lines*This mini version is made of satin calfskin with cage-stitched edges🌟
Shoulder or crossbody*Adjustable, detachable strap*Zipper closure, calfskin zipper pull*Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing🌟
Model:3001B
